title: One note blames cache, but the failure evidence is weak
userProblemStatement: A teammate suspects cache invalidation, but the only concrete evidence is a thin API log.

evidence.rawText: I think this is probably cache related because the issue looks stale after deploy.

2026-04-09T00:00:00Z service=api requestId=req-700 GET /api/cache
Error: read failed
    at loadCacheEntry (/srv/cache.js:10:2)
